PATIENT_ID: TEST_CAUTI_NURSING_001
ARRIVAL_TIME: 2026-01-15 08:00:00

[NURSING_NOTE] 2026-01-15 09:00:00
Foley catheter inserted. Indwelling urinary catheter in place.

[NURSING_NOTE] 2026-01-18 07:00:00
Foley catheter in place since admission day 1. Catheter day 3.
Patient reports dysuria and suprapubic tenderness.
Urine cloudy with foul odor noted during catheter care.
Catheter-associated urinary tract infection suspected.
New onset fever, temperature 38.9 C. Notified physician.

[LAB] 2026-01-18 08:00:00
Urine culture positive for Klebsiella pneumoniae.
Greater than 10^5 CFU/ml. Single species.
